messages.text: The chorister throws back its cowl of fused bone and aims its open, singing throat at you, and the held note sharpens to a lance of spore-thick sound that drives into you. The blow {verb} you!
The chorister bends its note toward you and you clap your hands over your ears and duck aside as the sound shatters a pillar of skulls behind you.
The chorister's note finds the pitch of your own bones and holds it, and for a moment your teeth sing along with the choir before the rot floods in! The blow {verb} you!
